title: Internal Audit Testing Agent (Banking)
problem: Auditors manually review hundreds of loan files against audit objectives, extracting evidence and writing workpapers — a weeks-long process that scales poorly.
solution: Agent reviews loan files against audit objectives, extracts evidence, maps it to audit criteria, produces draft workpapers with evidence citations, and routes to auditor for sign-off.
whoItsFor: Internal Audit Teams, Credit Risk, Loan Review Officers
workflowSteps: Audit lead specifies audit objectives and population of loan files
Agent ingests each file: extracts key fields (loan amount, borrower, collateral, approval chain)
Maps extracted data to each audit objective, flags exceptions
Drafts workpaper section per objective with evidence citations
Routes draft workpapers to auditor for review and sign-off
Auditor approves, modifies, or rejects; finalized workpapers archived
keyInsights: Every finding must be traceable to a source document page and paragraph — this is the compliance-grade citation requirement. The evaluation rubric (audit objectives) must be versioned and approved before the agent runs, not improvised per session.

relatedExams.why: Governance, Safety & Risk Management — audit trail requirements
Eval, Testing, and Debugging — evaluation framework design
Deploy AI-Powered Business Solutions — regulated industry deployment

mermaidDiagram:
flowchart TD
  A([Audit Objectives]) --> C[Extract and Map to Criteria]
  B([Loan File Population]) --> C
  C --> D{Exception Found?}
  D -->|Yes| E[Flag + Evidence Citation]
  D -->|No| F[Objective Pass]
  E & F --> G[Draft Workpaper Section]
  G --> H[Auditor Sign-Off HITL Gate]
  H --> I([Archive])
architectureNotes: The agent reads the audit test plan and control list, then queries the ERP/transaction system for sample data matching each test criteria. For each sample it applies the test logic (e.g., approval-chain verification, limit checks) and records pass/fail with evidence links. A HITL review step is triggered for any failed test before the finding is escalated. The audit workpaper is generated automatically.
